arts.ttl: Zapata’s Milestone Moment – Torino Striker Matches Dybala’s Serie A Record
arts.sum: Torino striker Duvan Zapata drew level with Paulo Dybala as the joint-best goalscorer in Serie A over the past ten years with Friday night's strike against Hellas Verona. The 33-year-old goal-getter was on the scoresheet as Paolo Vanoli's team grabbed a dramatic 3-2 victory at Stadio Marc'Antonio Bentegodi. The post Zapata’s Milestone Moment – Torino Striker Matches Dybala’s Serie A Record appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Castaway Set for Roma Redemption Under New Boss Ivan Juric
arts.sum: Nicola Zalewski's future has been among the major talking points in Italy over the past few weeks, with Roma casting him away after a long-running transfer saga. The Poland international rejected a late switch to Galatasaray despite the club's effort to offload him earlier in September. The post Castaway Set for Roma Redemption Under New Boss Ivan Juric appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Zalewski set for Roma reintegration under Juric
arts.sum: In a surprising turn of events, Nicola Zalewski is on the verge of being reintegrated into the AS Roma squad. This development marks one of the first significant changes under new manager Ivan Juric, who is effectively welcoming reinforcement on the flanks. The saga of the 22-year-old winger, who came through Roma’s youth ranks, began with his refusal to renew his contract (set to expire in 2025) and his rejection of a transfer to Galatasaray. These decisions led to the club’s drastic measure of indefinitely excluding Zalewski from the squad.
